title: Schema + migration + changeset trio — multi-currency product
prompt: Build a complete Product flow: schema + migration + context + changeset. Product has name, sku, base_currency (3-letter), and price_cents (integer — subunits, but use :decimal since fractional currency exists). Actually use :decimal for price and require precision/scale of 18, 4 to handle cryptocurrency sub-cent. Include unique on sku, validate currency length = 3, price > 0, and non-nil fields. Schema to lib/my_app/catalog/product.ex; migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260414100000_create_products.exs.
tier_rationale: Two-file synthesis with multiple constraints. Hard because precision, currency length, and unique must all be aligned.
research_citation: elixirmoney/money README + Arrowsmith Labs on unique constraints.
